title: zacateza pedicellata
intro: Zacateza pedicellata, also known as Mexican tea or hoja de la cruz, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Zacateza pedicellata include relief from fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, and it is also used in herbal remedies such as salves and tinctures.
